conventions.memberNaming: Follow the selected project exemplars; use Unity/C# defaults for a new project.
conventions.logging: Use the project logger when present; otherwise Unity Debug with actionable context.
conventions.asyncFlow: Choose coroutine, Task, or UniTask once and follow lifecycle cancellation.
conventions.events: Prefer typed events or direct interfaces according to module boundaries.
conventions.configuration: Use ScriptableObject or validated data for stable content.
conventions.uiArchitecture: Separate UI state/presentation from gameplay rules.
